name: Mediator: Memory-efficient LLM Merging with Less Parameter Conflicts and Uncertainty Based Routing

description: arXiv:2502.04411v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Model merging aggregates Large Language Models (LLMs) finetuned on different tasks into a stronger one. However, parameter conflicts between models leads to performance degradation in averaging. While model routing addresses this issue by selecting individual models during inference, it imposes excessive storage and compute costs, and fa...
author: Kunfeng Lai, Zhenheng Tang, Xinglin Pan, Peijie Dong, Xiang Liu, Haolan Chen, Huacan Wang, Li Shen, Bo Li, Xiaowen Chu
